race.comment: MEISHO (6) looks well placed here third up. Two runs back have been good in handy races, beaten a length when well in contention at Ballarat last start over 1100m. Back to the 1000m here suits, she'll roll along for East and take catching. BEAU STRADA (9) broke through for an easy maiden win at Sale last start when backed into $1.50. Comes here on the quick turnaround and will be hard to hold out. ABOVETHEFROSTLINE (1) won well here in a BM56 second up after tracking the pace. Stays in this grade hence the weight rise but she can win again. ESPANA (7) has just been fair in two runs back but they've been in tougher affairs and this suits nicely.
